title: Legal threats force corrections over scale measuring medication usage: A case study analysed by the method of Seven Steps
author: Hosseini Mohammad
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
description: This document uses a real case to show how the case study analysis method of Seven Steps (as  introduced  on the Embassy of Good Science) should be used by research ethics and integrity experts or researchers.
steps_raw: This document uses a real case to show how the case study analysis method of Seven Steps (as  introduced  on the Embassy of Good Science) should be used by research ethics and integrity experts or researchers.
